query:
SELECT 
  rating,
  indexador,
  COUNT(*) as n,
  ROUND(AVG(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4))) * 100, 1) as media_bps,
  ROUND(STD(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4))) * 100, 1) as std_bps,
  ROUND(MIN(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4))) * 100, 1) as min_bps,
  ROUND(MAX(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4))) * 100, 1) as max_bps,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isOutlier = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as outliers_atuais
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE scoreMatch >= 0.90
GROUP BY rating, indexador
ORDER BY indexador, n DESC;

  ROUND(MAX(CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(10,4))) * 100, 1) as max_bps,
  SUM(CASE WHEN isOutlier = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as outliers_atuais
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE scoreMatch >= 0.90
GROUP BY rating, indexador
ORDER BY indexador, n DESC;
